<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  val user :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Eliom.Content.Html.D.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Eliom.Content.Html.D.elt
  val signout :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Eliom.Content.Html.D.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Eliom.Content.Html.D.elt
  val close :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Eliom.Content.Html.D.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Eliom.Content.Html.D.elt
end >>
